_comment: passtest configuration. 'dict_dir' is watched for '<wordlist>_###.txt' chunks (as produced by passgen -o <wordlist>.txt -s). Each 'jobs' entry runs hashcat with mode '-m', optional 'device' (-d, a GPU id), and optional extra 'args', against 'header_bin' (the dd-extracted volume header). Jobs on distinct devices run in parallel (one hashcat instance per GPU); jobs sharing a device run sequentially. Common TrueCrypt modes: 6211/6212/6213 (RIPEMD160), 6221/6222/6223 (SHA512), 6231+ (Whirlpool). VeraCrypt: 13711-13713 (RIPEMD160), 13721-13723 (SHA512), 13751-13753 (SHA256), 13731+ (Whirlpool). As a fallback you may instead supply a flat 'modes': [..] list plus 'devices': [..] and 'hcat_args': [..].
